Legal

Acceptable Use Policy

Effective date: 07 May 2026

This Acceptable Use Policy (“AUP”) governs permitted and prohibited uses of VORYNEX PRIVATE LIMITED’s (“Vorynex”, “we”, “us”) website and Services. This policy supports security, regulatory expectations, and enterprise-grade operational integrity.

1) General obligations

  • - Use the Services only for lawful purposes and in compliance with applicable Indian laws and regulations.
  • - Maintain accurate account information and protect credentials.
  • - Respect intellectual property rights and confidentiality obligations.
  • - Follow all policies referenced in our Terms & Conditions.

2) Prohibited activities

You must not, directly or indirectly:

  • - Use the Services for any unlawful, fraudulent, misleading, or deceptive activity.
  • - Attempt to gain unauthorized access to accounts, systems, networks, or data.
  • - Interfere with, disrupt, or degrade the integrity or performance of the Services (including through excessive requests or abuse).
  • - Transmit malware, exploit vulnerabilities, or conduct security testing without written authorization.
  • - Harvest or process personal data without lawful basis, consent (where required), or compliance with applicable data protection laws.
  • - Use the Services to violate third-party rights, including privacy, IP, contractual, or confidentiality obligations.
  • - Misrepresent your identity or affiliation, or impersonate any person or entity.
  • - Engage in activities that create material risk to payment integrity, financial compliance, or consumer protection obligations.

3) Security & compliance controls

We may implement monitoring, throttling, verification, and other controls to protect systems and maintain compliance. We may request additional information for identity verification or risk review, particularly in cases of unusual activity, disputes, or payment anomalies.

4) Enforcement

We reserve the right to investigate suspected violations and take action including: warnings, rate limiting, temporary suspension, termination, refusal of service, and cooperation with law enforcement/regulators where required. We may preserve evidence and logs associated with violations, subject to applicable law and our Privacy Policy.

5) Reporting concerns

To report misuse, security issues, or compliance concerns, contact contact@vorynex.in. For customer support issues, contact support@vorynex.in.

6) Updates

We may update this AUP from time to time. Continued use of the Services after updates are published constitutes acceptance of the revised AUP.

VORYNEX PRIVATE LIMITED

Enterprise-grade SaaS and online software services from India.
